sense.definition: a type of multiplayer video game where players control distinct characters, each with unique abilities or skills, and compete in team-based battles

examples.x: I spent the afternoon playing a hero shooter with my friends.
In a hero shooter, each player can choose a different character with special abilities.
If you enjoy fast-paced action games, you might like playing a hero shooter.
The new hero shooter update added several new characters to choose from.
Hero shooters require a lot of teamwork, as each character plays a unique role in the game.

sense.definition: a genre of video games where players control a character who fights numerous enemies in hand-to-hand combat

examples.x: I spent the whole afternoon playing a beat 'em up game with my friends.
He loves old-school arcade games, especially the classic beat 'em ups from the 90s.
She picked up a new beat 'em up and couldn't put it down until she beat all the levels.
They had a blast playing the beat 'em up on the console during the weekend gathering.
After a long day, I like to unwind by playing a few rounds of a beat 'em up game.

sense.definition: a type of computer game in which one plays the role of an adventurer and carries the game plot forward by performing certain actions such as exploring the game world, navigating routes, finding clues, etc.

examples.x: I love playing adventure games because they always have such interesting stories and puzzles to solve.
She spent the afternoon exploring new levels in her favorite adventure game.
We used to play adventure games together when we were kids, always getting lost in the storylines.
My brother is obsessed with adventure games; he’s always talking about the latest one he’s playing.
I’m looking for a good adventure game to play on my computer this weekend.

sense.definition: a type of video game that is played from the player's point of view from start to finish

examples.x: I spent the whole afternoon playing a first-person shooter with my friends online.
He loves first-person shooters because they make him feel like he's actually in the action.
The new first-person shooter I bought has amazing graphics and fast-paced gameplay.
My brother is really good at first-person shooters; he always finishes at the top of the leaderboard.
We played a few rounds of a first-person shooter after school to unwind.

sense.definition: a type of video game that creates a simulated reality in which the player is able to play a role or do a certain activity

examples.x: I spent the afternoon playing a simulation video game where I ran a virtual farm.
She enjoys playing simulation video games because they help her relax after a long day.
My brother loves playing simulation video games that let him build and manage cities.
The new simulation video game about space exploration is amazing; it feels so realistic.
He’s been playing a simulation video game about running a theme park, and he's getting really good at it.

sense.definition: a video game that is played simultaneously over the Internet by several players and allows them to interact with each other while playing
a type of video game that provides a two-dimensional environment with a fixed background and a series of platforms on which the character can jump on

examples.x: I spent hours playing that platform game last night, trying to get through all the levels.
My little brother loves playing platform games because he enjoys jumping over obstacles.
She finished the entire platform game in just one afternoon, even though it was tough.
We decided to play a platform game together, and it was so much fun competing to finish first.
I grew up playing platform games like Super Mario, and they’re still my favorite genre.

sense.definition: a video game or interactive system that combines physical exercise and gameplay, typically using motion tracking sensors or other input devices to track the player's movements and translate them into in-game actions

examples.x: I’ve been playing an exergame every morning to help me stay in shape.
We decided to try an exergame instead of going to the gym today.
I downloaded a new exergame on my console, and it’s been a great way to stay active indoors.
Exergames are perfect for rainy days when I can’t go outside to exercise.

sense.definition: a type of online game that allows a large number of players to interact with each other in a virtual game world, often with a persistent game environment that continues to exist and evolve even when players are not actively playing

examples.x: They met in a massively multiplayer online role-playing game and became good friends.

sense.definition: a type of video game DLC that grants players access to a series of additional content, such as new levels, missions, items, or features, over the course of a specific period, typically a gaming "season"

examples.x: I bought the season pass for the game to get access to all the new updates and exclusive rewards.
If you get the season pass, you won’t need to purchase each DLC separately.
The season pass gives players early access to upcoming content, which is a great perk.
I’m waiting for the next season pass to come out so I can try all the new features.

sense.definition: a type of online video game that typically involves two teams of players battling against each other in a large symmetrical map

examples.x: I spent the afternoon playing a multiplayer online battle arena with some friends, and we managed to win the match after a tough fight.

sense.definition: a video game played over the internet on devices such as PCs, gaming consoles, and mobile devices

examples.x: I spent the whole afternoon playing an online game with my friends.
After school, we usually play an online game together to relax.
I prefer playing online games because I can compete with players from around the world.
They met through an online game and became good friends.
My brother is always playing an online game on his computer.

sense.definition: a game played alone, without other people, focusing on individual progress and enjoyment

examples.x: I love playing single-player video games because I can enjoy the story without distractions.
She prefers single-player video games over multiplayer ones because she enjoys exploring the world on her own.
In a single-player video game, you don't have to rely on other people to win, which can be nice sometimes.
He spent the entire weekend playing his favorite single-player video game.
After a long week, I enjoy playing a single-player video game to escape into a different world.

sense.definition: a type of video game that focuses on players controlling vehicles, such as cars or motorcycles

examples.x: I love playing racing games on my console, especially when I get to choose different cars.
We spent the afternoon playing a racing game with friends, trying to see who could finish the fastest.
Have you ever tried a racing game where you can race through city streets?
My brother is really good at racing games; he always beats me by a few seconds.
I’m thinking of buying a new racing game to play on my gaming PC this weekend.

sense.definition: a type of video game that allows players significant freedom and open-world exploration, often featuring nonlinear gameplay and interactive environments where players can shape the game world and create their own experiences

examples.x: She spent hours in the sandbox game, creating a detailed city from scratch.
He enjoys playing sandbox games because they allow him to be creative and imaginative.
Sandbox games are great for players who like to make their own stories and adventures.
The sandbox game offered endless possibilities, from farming and fishing to fighting monsters.
One of the best things about a sandbox game is the freedom to do whatever you want.

sense.definition: a type of video game where players control and manage resources, units, and structures in real-time to achieve objectives and defeat opponents

examples.x: After school, I enjoy playing a real-time strategy game to relax and challenge my mind.
We spent the weekend competing in a real-time strategy game tournament with friends.

sense.definition: a game that allows multiple players to interact and play together in the same game environment, either locally or over the internet

examples.x: He prefers multiplayer video games because they allow him to connect with others online.
They spent the weekend playing a multiplayer video game, working together to defeat the enemies.
Many people enjoy playing multiplayer video games with friends after school.
I love playing multiplayer video games, as they let me compete with others in real-time.
Multiplayer video games are great for bonding with people who live far away.

sense.definition: a video game genre that emphasizes physical challenges, hand-eye coordination, and fast-paced gameplay, often involving combat, platforming, or shooting elements

examples.x: I spent the afternoon playing an action game with my friends online.
The action game was so intense, I couldn’t take my eyes off the screen.
He enjoys action games because they keep him on the edge of his seat.
My brother is really good at action games, he always finishes them quickly.
She prefers action games over strategy games because she likes moving fast and making quick decisions.

sense.definition: a game that heavily focuses on close combat between in-game characters, wherein each player chooses a character or a team of characters from the game's roster to compete against other players

examples.x: I always pick the strongest character from the list when I play fighting games.
In a fighting game, timing your attacks correctly is key to winning.
She spent hours practicing in the fighting game to learn new moves.
My brother prefers playing fighting games over other types of video games.
They played a fighting game for hours, trying to beat each other’s scores.

sense.definition: a video game genre that involves players controlling a character who uses firearms or other ranged weapons to defeat enemies and achieve objectives

examples.x: The latest shooter video game offers new levels and weapons for players to try out.
He prefers playing shooter video games over other types because of the competitive nature.

sense.definition: a genre that challenges players to solve various puzzles or problems using logic, pattern recognition, and critical thinking to progress through the game

examples.x: I spent hours playing a puzzle video game on my phone last night.
She enjoys playing puzzle video games because they help her relax after a long day.
Puzzle video games are a fun way to pass the time when I’m waiting for something.
He finished a really tough level in his puzzle video game today.
The new puzzle video game I downloaded has some tricky challenges to solve.

sense.definition: a genre that simulates real-world sports and allows players to compete in virtual versions of various sports activities

examples.x: I love playing sport video games with my friends on weekends.
My little brother spends hours playing his favorite sport video game.
We played a sport video game last night, and I scored the winning goal.
I bought a new sport video game that lets you play soccer online with others.
She is really good at sport video games, especially basketball.

sense.definition: a genre that involves planning and decision-making to achieve specific objectives, often in a simulated environment with multiple variables and challenges

examples.x: The new strategy video game is fun, but it takes a lot of patience to master.
She spends hours playing a strategy video game where she controls an entire civilization.
He enjoys playing strategy video games because they challenge him to make smart decisions.
I prefer strategy video games over action games because they make me think critically.

sense.definition: a video game genre where the player's character is visible on the screen, and the gameplay primarily involves shooting at enemies from a third-person perspective

examples.x: She spent hours playing her favorite third-person shooter, trying to beat her high score.
They are releasing a new third-person shooter next month, and fans are excited to try it out.
I enjoy playing third-person shooters because I like having a clear view of my character and the action around me.
My friend and I played a third-person shooter together, teaming up to defeat enemies in a virtual world.
